name: unsat_defining_rules
description: Unsat debugging must complete the minimal core with the rules defining the atoms that the core constraints require to be true: ':- not a.' pulls in 'a :- c.', ':- not d, not e.' pulls in 'c | d.' (head d) and reports that e has no defining rule. ':- not d, e.' is correctly absent: e can never be true, so that constraint never fires.
program:
:- not a.
a :- c.
c | d.
:- not d, e.
:- not d, not e.

expected_unsat_responses.rule: No rules with e in the head
